testimonials.heading: Trusted by homeowners and investors across the market

items.name: James R.
items.quote: Buying my first investment property was a big decision, but Maison Monchef guided me every step of the way. They were transparent, knowledgeable, and always available.

items.name: Fatima A.
items.quote: I was comparing several projects before deciding. Their advice wasn’t based on making a sale; it was based on what made sense for my goals. That honesty earned my trust.

items.name: Sarah L.
items.quote: As an overseas investor, I needed someone I could rely on. Their market knowledge and honest guidance gave me complete confidence throughout the process.

faq.heading: Need answers about properties?
faq.intro: Direct answers on advisory, portfolio building, and how we work with our clients.

items.question: Do you work with international clients?
items.answer: Yes. A significant part of our clientele is based overseas. We advise remotely from first enquiry to closing, and can represent you fully in Dubai when you cannot be here in person.

items.question: Do you handle off-plan properties?
items.answer: We do. We advise on off-plan opportunities from Dubai's leading developers, assessing each project on its fundamentals (developer track record, location, and long-term value) before we recommend it.

items.question: Can you help build an investment portfolio?
items.answer: Yes. Portfolio building is one of our core services. We design a considered acquisition strategy around your goals and time horizon, then guide each purchase from selection to handover.

items.question: Is consultation confidential?
items.answer: Always. Discretion is fundamental to how we work: every conversation, mandate, and transaction is handled in strict confidence.

items.question: Do you support clients in Arabic and French?
items.answer: Yes. Our advisors work comfortably in English, Arabic, and French, so you can be counselled in the language you think in.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Simply reach out: by phone, WhatsApp, or the contact form. A short first conversation lets us understand your goals and propose the right next step.
